reference_answer: The accepted allocation total for Cycle C-17 is 118 service slots.
Amendment A-4 proposed adding 7 temporary service slots.
No. Amendment A-4 was not adopted before the review closed.
The planning total would be 125 service slots, because 118 plus 7 equals 125.
The released count for Batch M-42 is 203 components.
Supplement S-9 would add 12 held-back components if it passed review.
No. Supplement S-9 failed review and was not released.
The worksheet count would be 215 components, because 203 plus 12 equals 215.
